namespace.description: Namespace where the autopilot resources are installed.

geminiApiKey.description: Reference to an existing secret holding the Gemini API key.

models.description: Model configurations, keyed by an arbitrary alias.

projectID.description: GCP project ID hosting Vertex AI.

vertexAI.description: Gemini Vertex AI provider configuration. When enabled, ModelConfigs use provider GeminiVertexAI with Application Default Credentials (no API key) — the pod's GKE node SA must have aiplatform access. secretName is optional (only for explicit SA-key auth).

enabled.description: Opt-in: render every model slot as a kagent ModelConfig with provider Ollama pointing at host. Takes precedence over vertexAI. Default false (vertexAI/Gemini stays the default).

model.description: Local model id pulled in Ollama; overrides every slot's model id. Must support tool calling (e.g. qwen3.6).

localModel.description: Local LLM (Ollama) provider — opt-in path to run the agents on a local, no-cloud model.

mcpServers.description: Remote MCP servers, keyed by an arbitrary alias.

agents.description: Agents to deploy, keyed by agent name.

hitlApproval.description: HITL approval gate for mutating k8s tools. true=pause for approval (safe); false=autonomous remediation.

global.description: Helm global values (injected by the composition runtime).

extraAgents.description: Extra A2A sub-agents to register on the orchestrator (component/blueprint-contributed specialists, e.g. the installer's krateo-installer-agent). The orchestrator stays the single mandatory entry point; these are reachable only via its routing.
